ground_truth.title: What are Certificate Programs? | Goodwin University
ground_truth.main_content: A certificate is official documentation that certifies an individual has received specialized education or has successfully completed necessary testing in a certain subject or skill. Goodwin University offers the following certificate programs: Business Administration, Certified Addiction Counselor, CNC Machining 18-Credit Certificate, CNC Machining, Metrology and Manufacturing Technology, Licensed Practical Nurse (LPN), Medical Assisting, Medical Billing and Coding, Patient Care Technician, Violence Intervention and Advocacy, and Welding. For a full list of all certificate program offerings, please visit our majors page. Enrollment is hassle-free, and it's easy to get started. Financial aid is available, and applications are still being accepted. Comprehensive support services are available to help students through college and into a great career. The university is veteran-friendly and understands the needs of veteran students. Students who want to transfer credits can have their unofficial transcripts reviewed in less than one business day.
